linkedin_profile.headline: General Manager - Hotel d'Inghilterra in Rome - Small Luxury Hotels
linkedin_profile.about: Massimo Colli is the General Manager of the Hotel d’Inghilterra Starhotels Collezione in Rome, part of Exclusive Italian Boutique Hotel and 5 Stars Small Luxury Hotel, located in the heart of Rome closed to the Spanish Steps, Colli is responsible for all operations including Revenue, Sales & Marketing, Room Division, Food & Beverage, Administration and standards policy. Before to joining the Hotel d’Inghillterra in 2011, Colli spent over 17 years in the most luxurious hotels around Italy and in Europe. He came from the Hotel Hassler in Rome Leading Hotel of the World’s, where he spent 4 year as Director of Food & Beverage, from the Grand Hotel Rome Marriot Park, one of the biggest hotels in Europe for Conventions and Banqueting Functions, where is spent 1 and half year in the opening and from the Grand Hotel Westin part of the Starwood Hotels, where is spent 4 year as Outlet Manager. Before Colli held difference positions in a luxury hotels with high standards, including as Assistant Restaurant Manager at the Hotel Il Pellicano part of The Leading Hotels of the World’s and other general f&b experiences carried out in the past are at The Savoy In London, UK, at The Bayerischer Hof in Germany part of The Leading Hotels of the World’s, at the Kempinski Hotel Vier Jahreszeiten - Monaco di Baviera, Germany, at the Grand Hotel Tschuggen Arosa, Switzerland.. Massimo Colli, General Manager with 20 years of experience in both Hotel chain and privately owned 5 star hotels & resorts Experience in planning, marketing, sales, administration and direction of operation in luxury properties. Also experienced in hotel openings, hotel renovations and repositioning with a reputation for high quality service standards

linkedin_profile.headline: Global Marketing and PR Director @Starhotels | Forbes Top 100 CMO Italia | Brand Builder | Entrepreneur | Investor | D&I Advocate | Made in Italy Ambassador
linkedin_profile.about: Over the last 15 years, my career has been an incredible journey learning about luxury hospitality, retail, consumer goods, and most importantly people. The differentiating factors for a company are people and innovation. The world is moving fast and great companies have people who challenge convention and lead change. I aim to create an impact, building strategies that break the mold and meet the evolving needs of clients and the global market. I’m a firm believer in the power of motivation, mental well-being, and empathy, I bring a human-centered perspective to my professional endeavors. My passion for creating meaningful experiences and products extends into my interests—whether skiing down mountains, diving, exploring art, or immersing myself in new cultures. Connecting people, brands, and ideas is at the heart of what I do. 🎯 What sets me apart as a CMO? • Versatility & Adaptability : I quickly grasp the unique dynamics in each industry, connecting the dots and bringing fresh perspectives that balance local insights with global strategies. • Impactful Innovation: I’m committed to disruptive innovation with a measurable focus, driving significant ROI and expanding customer bases. • Entrepreneurial and Collaborative Leadership: I read between the line and usually I anticipate market trends and needs, launching initiatives that elevate brands beyond expectations. I also foster an inclusive work environment that champions creativity and team growth. Work ethic is key to me. Ready to connect with like-minded innovators, collaborators, and visionaries who share the commitment to elevate customer experiences and shape the future.

experience.title: Chief Executive Officer And Member Of The Board Of Directors

Develop supply chain sustainability strategy, activities, and products (i.e. recycled fabrics’ lineup) • Built productive relationships with industry partners and competitors to support strategic business objectives. • Spearheaded product line diversification to achieve a 4% increase in revenue and penetrate wider markets. • Improved business profits by 112%. +6 new markets, +3 new categories • Orchestrated positive media coverage and stakeholder relations as the public face of Piave Maitex company. • Build an e-commerce for stock, high turnover fabrics, and covid protection. • First to have researched, developed, and registered an anti-bacterial and anti-coronavirus fabric. experience.title: Consultant Investor Startups

experience.title: Executive Board Member
experience.description: The MarediModa Fair, which takes place every year since 2002, is the most important event for the premiere presentation of the collections of fabrics and accessories for the beachwear, underwear and athleisure sectors. Also for this reason, it is a fundamental appointment for professionals in terms of contacts, exchanges, business and new business. To keep up with the sudden changes in the market, the MarediModa exhibition is constantly evolving. Since 2007, it has offered its guests a space dedicated to manufaturers on commission from the Euro Med area and in Italy, reliable partners to create a winning collection.

experience.title: Regional Revenue Management And Operational Innovation Coordinator, Southern Europe
experience.description: Supporting the Regional Director of Revenue Management (RDRM) with essential administrative duties and fulfil reporting and analysis tasks - Supporting the RDRM in managing 56 hotels across the Southern Europe region and providing assistance to the SE Revenue Manager Teams especially in terms of rate loading, audit, preparation of regional files, monthly closure, etc. - Supporting the RDRM in preparing the official daily, weekly and monthly operations to analyze and improve the Regional Performance: Daily pick up, Pace, Risk File, Monthly closing, Forecast Accuracy, RPI Analysis, Group backlog - Supporting the Regional Team during the budget preparation and the Divisional Reviews. - Supporting the Master Black Belt (MBB) with essential administrative and reporting tasks: Monthly closure, performance Analysis, action plans and meetings preparation. - Supporting the MBB in managing the Black Belt (BB) team and providing them assistance with their projects. - Supporting the MBB in running Regional Projects as: StarPUSH, Prosource (I am the project leader), Dinamyc Currency Conversion, StarLot and Spapedia; Preparing the documentation for the Six Sigma tool and the materials to be used during the team meetings. - Participation in 3 LORs at Westin Excelsior Rome, St. Regis Rome and Sheraton Rome - Taking care of almost all the PPT presentations for our SE Vice President and realizing analysis ad hoc when required.

experience.title: Revenue Management Executive, Milan Area - In Charge Of The Westin Palace
experience.description: Supporting the Director of Revenue Management (DORM) with essential administrative duties and daily, weekly and monthly operations for the Hotel and the Starwood Milan Area: Daily pick up, Pricing, STR analysis, Pace, 30/60/90 days Forecast, Month Closure reporting, Group Backlog analysis, Displacement analysis and all the documentation requested by the owners. - Monitoring pricing, inventory, oversell and business mix according with historical demand, forecast figures and competitors position. - Daily monitoring of proper systems synchronizations (PMS, CRS, ROS). - Monthly reviews with hotel team to discuss results and develop strategies to improve the business, based on future demand, forecast, current trends, historical data and competitor pricing. - Budget preparation - Strong interaction with Sales department on contracting with Corporate Accounts. - Collaboration with Sales Team and Event department for group acceptance and quotations; - Collaboration with Front Office and Reservation department for optimal inventory allocation, Reservation issues and upselling strategies;

My passion is managing daily challenges with a strategic approach to provide outstanding experiences to guests. I believe that excellent service level can only be reached with teamworking and continuous "on the job" training. My mind top priorities are: - Staff training; - Guests satisfaction; - Ensure operational day-to-day efficiency; - Company's financial state of health with P&L control and annual budgeting; - Maintain a long term strategy and a entrepreneurial approach to business; - Align to Company's Governance to guarantee share-holders value; - Respect for the environment. Ambitious goals can be reach through: - Constant education; - Respect, resilience and trust; - Balance of mental and body health (running is my relief valve). I work to be a point of reference for the people I deal with so that my loved ones can be proud of me. All these let me wake up every morning with a smile. My real strength!

Our goal is to offer a metropolitan relaxing gateway in our swimming pool even during an important congress our enjoying an "al fresco" dinner on our terrace during a roman vacation or a business trip in the eternal city.
